role_teacher_desc: I create tests and track progress
profile_dark_desc: Easy on the eyes in darkness

hero_sub: An adaptive platform powered by generative AI. Personalized approach for every student, automation of teacher routines, and an inclusive environment for all.
sec_modules_sub: Each module solves a specific school education problem using generative AI
mod1_desc: The platform adapts materials automatically: text-to-speech for visually impaired, simplified language, visual diagrams and mind maps.
mod2_desc: AI generates tests with answer options, grading criteria, and explanations in seconds.
mod3_desc: AI tutor analyzes gaps, adapts difficulty, and explains through familiar analogies.
mod4_desc: Semantic essay analysis: logic, structure, and argumentation. Feedback for student and analytics for teacher.
sec_how_sub: Choose your role and discover your step-by-step path on the platform
sec_benefits_sub: A platform that combines AI power with best educational practices
ben_instant_desc: Test generation, essay review, and explanations — in seconds
ben_ai_assistant_desc: Smart chatbot helps understand any topic
ben_personalized_desc: AI adapts to student level and interests
ben_analytics_desc: Transparent reports on progress and problem areas
ben_inclusive_desc: Accessibility for students with special needs
sec_demo_sub: Real examples of what EduAI does every day
sec_pricing_sub: Start for free. Upgrade to PRO when you're ready for full AI power.
pricing_starter_desc: Perfect for getting to know the platform
cta_sub: Join EduAI — free, no obligations. Start learning smarter right now.
tl_s1_desc: Create a unique profile, specify your grade, interests and choose a learning style for full personalization.
tl_s2_desc: AI adapts difficulty to you. Texts are converted to easy-read format, supplemented with audio and mind maps.
tl_s3_desc: Ask questions in chat 24/7. The AI assistant knows the context of the current lesson and will help you understand complex topics.
tl_s4_desc: Solve tests and write detailed answers. AI will instantly check your work and provide detailed analytics of strengths and weaknesses.
tl_t1_desc: Upload texts, curricula and guides — AI will analyze them, highlight key points and structure them in seconds.
tl_t2_desc: Automatic creation of tests and tasks with grading criteria based on uploaded materials.
tl_t3_desc: Delegate routine to algorithms. AI evaluates not only tests, but also open essays by set criteria.
tl_t4_desc: Study detailed reports. Identify weak topics in the class and adapt the program to students' needs.
tl_o1_title: Connect your school to the platform
tl_o1_desc: Register your organization and get access to a powerful admin panel for infrastructure management.
tl_o2_desc: Flexible configuration of classes, subjects, curricula and role assignment.
tl_o3_desc: Unified dashboard for tracking statistics: comparative reports across grades, teacher progress and efficiency.
tl_o4_desc: Use API integration with existing systems to automate processes and scale to other branches.
copilot_welcome: I'm EduAI Copilot, your personal learning assistant.
copilot_welcome2: I can explain complex topics, help with exam preparation, check essays and find memorization methods. Just write your question!
copilot_disclaimer: EduAI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
copilot_new_started: New chat started. How can I help?
copilot_temp_notice: This chat is not saved to history
faq_sub: Answers to the most popular questions about EduAI
contact_sub: We are always happy to help
footer_desc: An intelligent educational platform powered by generative AI. Personalization, adaptability, accessibility — for every student and teacher.

dash_when_students: Results will appear here when students complete tests
contact_hero_sub: Questions, suggestions, partnerships — we are always in touch and respond within 24 hours
contact_write_desc: Fill out the form and our team will contact you shortly.
contact_faq_title: Maybe the answer is already here?
faq_write_desc: Write to us — we will answer any question
about_hero_sub: Mission, technology, values, and team — everything worth knowing about us
about_mission_sub: EduAI was created with one goal — to make quality personalized education accessible to every student and teacher in Kazakhstan and beyond.
about_value_knowledge_desc: We believe everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of location, income, or physical limitations.
about_ai_tool_desc: AI doesn't replace the teacher — it empowers them. AI handles routine tasks, freeing time for creativity.
about_inclusivity_desc: Built-in accessibility tools — TTS, text simplification, mind maps — make learning possible for everyone.
about_modules_sub: Each module solves a specific task in the educational process and runs on generative AI.
about_accessible_desc: Text-to-speech, simplification of complex paragraphs, and mind map generation. Full support for Kazakh and Russian.
about_teacher_desc: Automatic generation of tests, quizzes, and homework on any topic.
about_personal_desc: AI analyzes student learning style and adapts material delivery.
about_review_desc: Instant essay review by criteria: literacy, argumentation, structure. Feedback in seconds.
about_cta_sub: Start using the platform for free — registration in 30 seconds.

copilot_q4: Help me write an essay outline

sub_hero_desc: Start free. Scale as you grow. Cancel anytime. No card required.
sub_starter_desc: Perfect for getting to know the platform
sub_pro_desc: Full access for students and teachers
sub_faq1_a: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account. Access remains until the end of the paid period.
sub_faq2_a: We accept bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), Kaspi and Halyk Bank transfers. Invoice payment available for schools.
sub_faq3_a: Yes! Schools with more students get special conditions. Contact us for a custom quote.
sub_faq4_a: Of course. You can upgrade or downgrade anytime. The difference is recalculated automatically.
sub_cta_desc: Try the free plan — no card, no commitment
pay_secure: Secure payment. Card data is encrypted.
pay_welcome: Subscription activated! Welcome to EduAI Pro.

fb_report_desc: AI will analyze test results and show problem topics.

per_interests_hint: AI will explain the topic through your interests
per_result_desc: Choose a topic and style — AI will create a unique explanation
per_profile_empty_desc: Take tests and ask questions — the system will adapt
acc_hero_desc: Automatic adaptation of materials to individual needs
acc_tts_placeholder: Paste lecture text... AI will convert to audio.
acc_easyread_placeholder: Paste complex text... AI will simplify without losing meaning.
acc_mindmap_placeholder: Paste lecture text... AI will create a visual diagram.
faq_fb1_a: EduAI is an intelligent educational platform based on generative AI. The platform includes 4 modules: accessible environment, teacher assistant, learning personalization and automatic work review.
faq_fb2_a: For students, teachers and schools. Students get personalized learning, teachers get test generation and analytics tools, schools get a unified management platform.
faq_fb3_a: The platform supports Kazakh, Russian and English. You can switch the interface language in your profile or via the navigation button.
faq_fb4_a: Basic plan — free (5 requests/day). Pro — 2,990 ₸/mo (unlimited, all modules). School — 14,990 ₸/mo (up to 50 teachers, 500 students, API).
faq_fb5_q: Can I try it for free?
faq_fb5_a: Yes! The basic plan is completely free. You can test the lesson catalog, basic personalization and 5 daily AI requests.
faq_fb6_a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Kaspi cards. For schools — bank transfer by contract.
faq_fb7_a: Yes. We use modern security standards to protect your data. We never share your data with third parties.
faq_fb8_a: Yes, the platform is fully responsive and works on any device — phones, tablets, computers.
faq_fb9_q: How to switch theme or language?
faq_fb9_a: You can switch theme via the navigation button (moon/sun) or in profile → "Appearance". Language is changed via the navigation button or in profile settings.
contact_faq1_q: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?
contact_faq1_a: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours on business days. Via Telegram — usually faster.
contact_faq2_q: Can we connect EduAI to our school?
contact_faq2_a: Yes! We have a School plan for up to 50 teachers and 500 students. Contact us to discuss terms.
contact_faq3_q: Is there an API for integration?
contact_faq3_a: API integration is available on the School plan. We provide documentation and technical support for connection.
demo_user_msg: Explain the Pythagorean theorem through Minecraft
demo_bot_msg: Imagine you're building a house in Minecraft. You need a ladder from the wall corner to the roof. Wall is 3 blocks, floor is 4 blocks. The ladder will be exactly 5 blocks! 🎮 a² + b² = c²
demo_test_q1_text: What process ensures the transfer of genetic information?
profile_tts_desc: Configure voice and speech synthesis parameters. Settings apply across the entire platform.
profile_tts_sample: Hello! This is a sample of speech synthesis on the EduAI platform.
faq_a1: EduAI is an intelligent educational platform powered by generative AI. It includes 4 modules: accessible environment, teacher assistant, personalized learning, and automated grading.
faq_a2: For students, teachers, and schools. Students get personalized learning, teachers get test generation and analytics tools, schools get a unified management platform.
faq_a3: The platform supports Kazakh, Russian, and English. You can switch the interface language in your profile or via the navigation button.
faq_q4: How does the AI assistant work?
faq_a4: The AI assistant (Copilot) uses generative AI to answer questions on any school subject. It supports chat, test generation, essay analysis, and mind map creation.
faq_a5: Yes! The Teacher Assistant module lets you paste text on a topic — AI will generate a test with answer choices, grading criteria, and explanations.
faq_a6: The Feedback module analyzes text across multiple criteria: logic, structure, argumentation, and literacy. AI provides scores and improvement recommendations.
faq_a7: Free tier — 5 requests/day. Pro — 2,990 ₸/month (unlimited, all modules). School — 14,990 ₸/month (up to 50 teachers, 500 students, API).
faq_a8: Yes! The free tier is completely free. You can test the lesson catalog, basic personalization, and 5 AI requests daily.
faq_a9: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and Kaspi cards. For schools — bank transfer by contract.
faq_a10: Yes. We use modern security standards to protect your data. We do not share your data with third parties.
faq_a11: Yes, the platform is fully responsive and works on all devices — phones, tablets, and computers.
faq_q12: How do I change the theme or language?
faq_a12: Theme can be switched via the navigation button (moon/sun) or in Profile → Appearance. Language is changed via the navigation button or profile settings.
